name: shared-learning emission excludes any per-rule detail beyond the aggregate counts
command: mkdir -p community/shared-learning && printf '{"per_rule":{"no-eval":{"fp":1,"tp":2}},"aggregate":{"fp":1,"tp":2}}\n' > community/shared-learning/counts.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/community/shared-learning/emit.sh" --counts community/shared-learning/counts.json --opt-in --dry-run 2>out.txt && ! grep -q 'no-eval' out.txt && grep -q 'aggregate_only=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
